description_long: This object is a small, cylindrical bottle with a slightly tapered shape, wider at the top and narrower at the base. The exterior surface has a natural, speckled texture and coloration, resembling cork material, with a matte finish and visible pores. The top of the bottle appears flat and closed, with no visible opening or spout, suggesting it is sealed. There are no visible labels, logos, or decorative elements on the surface, giving it a plain and utilitarian appearance. The color is a consistent light brown with darker speckles throughout, typical of natural cork. The object is compact and lightweight, suitable for use as a stopper or closure for another container.
description: A small, tapered cylindrical bottle made of speckled light brown cork with a matte, porous surface and no visible labels or openings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bottle's slightly tapered cylindrical shape and flat top, with a uniform speckled cork texture.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the same taper and texture, with no visible seams or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view is nearly identical to the front, maintaining the same cork pattern and shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the consistent cork texture and tapered form, with no distinguishing features.
